title: Incredibly Optimized
description: New 1.21 version out! Improves performance and optimization of your 1.20.4+ versions of Minecraft!
body:
A simple modpack that improves the performance and graphics optimization of Minecraft!

### Performance
This modpack has one of the highest performance than other modpacks.
### Optimization Pack
This modpack is created for people to enjoy the best performance possible on Minecraft, without needing to buy a new PC or lose time downloading the mods and updating them over and over again.
### Greatly Optimized
This modpack introduces several subtle enhancements that preserve the vanilla feel, including windowed fullscreen mode, fixes for bugs, and utilities to diagnose crashes.
### Aim
This modpack focuses on performance and graphics enhancements. It is faster than OptiFine, thanks to modern performance mods like Sodium, Lithium, and others. It supports most OptiFine features, including shaders, connected textures, and zoom. It also includes features that allow you to experience Minecraft just as you remember it.

![fps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33ef1f17babadc685e9d7f902c700a4205c69fb4.png)
